`docker/build/vendor/rk/` is generated by `docker/scripts/prepare_rk_vendor.sh`.

It is intentionally not committed because it contains board-local RKNN runtime
artifacts copied from the host system libraries.

`rkmpp` and `rkrga` are no longer copied into the image as prebuilt host `.so`
files. They are built inside the container from the source trees mounted from
`/home/orangepi/soft`.
